headlines.description: — Nickeil Alexander-Walker scored a career-high 41 points, Jalen Johnson had his 13th triple-double of the season and the Atlanta Hawks rolled past the Magic 124-112 on Monday night, extending
headlines.shortLinkText: Alexander-Walker scores career-high 41, Hawks roll past Magic 124-112 for their 10th straight win

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Washington Wizards

highlights.headline: Golden State Warriors vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Golden State Warriors vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Golden State Warriors vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/03/16 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kristaps Porzingis scored 30 points, De'Anthony Melton added 27 and the Golden State Warriors snapped a five-game losing streak with a 125-117 victory over the Washington Wizards on Monday night, earning coach Steve Kerr his 600th career victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kerr earns his 600th win, and Golden State hands the Wizards their 12th loss in a row, 125-117

headlines.description: — Deni Avdija and Toumani Camara each scored 18 points, and the Portland Trail Blazers coasted to 114-95 victory over the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Avdija and Camara each score 18 as the Trail Blazers coast past the Nets, 114-95

highlights.description: Phoenix Suns vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Phoenix Suns vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/03/16 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown had 18 of his 41 points in the fourth quarter and Jayson Tatum scored 21 in his fifth game back from an Achilles tendon injury to help the Boston Celtics beat the Phoenix Suns 120-112 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaylen Brown scores 18 of his 41 points in the fourth quarter to help Celtics beat Suns 120-112

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Memphis Grizzlies vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights) 2026/03/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Josh Giddey had 16 points, 15 rebounds and 13 assists for his fourth triple-double in five games, and the Chicago Bulls blew out Memphis 132-107 on Monday night to hand the depleted Grizzlies their eighth straight loss.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bulls blow out the Grizzlies 132-107 as Josh Giddey gets his 4th triple-double in the last 5 games

headlines.shortLinkText: Doncic leads Lakers to a 100-92 victory over the Rockets for their sixth straight victory

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at LA Clippers

highlights.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights) 2026/03/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 21 points and 13 rebounds, and the San Antonio Spurs overcame an early 14-point deficit before blowing most of a 24-point lead and recovering to hold off the Los Angeles Clippers 119-115 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama powers Spurs past Clippers 119-115 after wild swings and a late scare to reach 50 wins
